expressions.english: to win an award; to receive a prize
to be punished; to receive punishment
to exchange; to give and take
to answer the phone
to receive a gift
to get a salary
to receive an e-mail
Did you get my text message?
If you do bad things, you get punished.
expressions.notes:
나쁘다 = to be bad
나쁜 is the adjective form of 나쁘다.
일 = work; task; thing; stuff; occasion
나쁜 일을 하다 = to do something bad
벌 받다 = to be punished

expressions.english: Did you receive the e-mail I sent you?
I got a prize at school today.
I got a laptop computer for my graduation present.
I feel bad that I always just receive (things/help) from you.
expressions.notes:
항상 = always, all the time
-기만 하다 = just + V; to only + V

expressions.korean: 아까 전화 했는데 왜 안 받았어요?
expressions.english: Why didn't you answer the phone when I called you earlier?
expressions.notes:
아까 = before, earlier
전화하다 = to call, make a phone call
왜 = why; for what reason; how come

expressions.english: I got a lot of presents for my birthday.

expressions.korean: 이번 생일에 무슨 선물 받고 싶어요?
expressions.english: What gift do you want for your birthday this year?

expressions.korean: 저는 하루에 수십 통의 이메일을 받아요.
expressions.english: I get dozens of e-mails a day.
expressions.notes:
하루 = one day
수십 = dozens of
통 is a counter for phone calls/letters/e-mails/bottles.

expressions.korean: 오늘 월금 받았어요, 제가 맛있는 거 사줄게요.
expressions.english: I got paid today. I'll treat you to something delicious.
expressions.notes:
맛있다 = to be delicious
맛있는 is the adjective form of 맛있다.
맛있는 것 = something delicious, delicious food
사 주다 = to buy something for someone

expressions.korean: 수업 시간에 친구와 문자를 주고받다가 선생님께 혼났어요.
expressions.english: I was scolded by my teacher for texting my friend during class.
expressions.notes:
수업 = class
주고받다 = to give and receive
-다가 = as a result of + V-ing
선생님 = teacher
혼나다 = to get scolded

expressions.korean: 외국에 있는 친구에게 1주일 전에 편지를 보냈는데 오늘 받았대요.
expressions.english: A week ago I sent a letter to my friend who is staying overseas, and she said she got it today.
expressions.notes:
외국 = foreign country
1주일 = one week
전 = (polite) I (subject)
편지 = letter
